---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or painful today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Rough is fine.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, and why they fall short.

## Scope / security notes

Does this touch enrollment, the agent↔backend channel, agent confinement
(sudoers/privhelper), RBAC, or authentication? If so, note it — such changes are
reviewed against [`THREAT-MODEL.md`](../../THREAT-MODEL.md).
